station_code: Must match an existing station code in INMACOM database
sampling_depth_m: Depth of sample from surface in metres (0 for surface; leave blank if not applicable)
parameter_code:
pH | EC | TDS | DO | turbidity | temperature | COD | BOD | faecal_coliform | nitrate | phosphate | ammonia | fluoride | arsenic | lead | mercury | cadmium
(One row per parameter per station per date)
unit: pH units | µS/cm | mg/L | % | NTU | °C | MPN/100mL  (use default unit for parameter)
detection_flag: = | < | >  (= exact value; < below detection limit; > above instrument range)

notes: Repeat row for each parameter measured at same station & time
